2024-12-14T18:16:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement is being implemented on Stubbs Road near Shiu Fai Terrace. Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-14T18:16:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，司徒拔道近肇輝臺現已實施單線雙程行車措施。 現時上址交通繁忙。

description.LOCATION_EN: Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road
description.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋香港連接路

2024-12-14T19:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-12-14T19:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強⾵，港珠澳⼤橋⾹港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排：港珠澳⼤橋⾹港連接路的最⾼⾞速限制由每⼩時100 公⾥降低⾄每⼩時50 公⾥。

2024-12-14T19:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Chuk Yuen Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-14T19:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近竹園道的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-12-14T19:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近竹園道的部份行車線現已解封。
